properties.description: The railroad Slangerupbanen went from Lygten Station; LYGTEN L (Lygten 2) through Lersøparken, onwards north to Farum and Slangerup. The engine was a dieselmotor wagon (1930-ish) with passenger cabin plus attached passenger- and cargo wagons.
